final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic poster illustrating step-by-step instructions for deploying Hermes inside a Docker container and integrating it with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: clean flat vector infographic, technical documentation style, isometric icons for containers and code elements
Composition: vertical single-column layout, four numbered steps stacked top to bottom, each step in a distinct card/panel
Subject: four clearly labeled steps — Step 1: pull Docker image for Hermes; Step 2: run and configure the Docker container; Step 3: install and configure GLMCodingPlan inside the container; Step 4: connect and verify Hermes with GLMCodingPlan integration — each step accompanied by a terminal/code snippet illustration and a small icon
Scene/backdrop: plain light gray or white background, subtle grid lines suggesting a technical dashboard
Lighting/mood: flat, no shadows, clean and readable, neutral technical tone
Color palette: deep navy blue as primary structure color, bright teal as accent for step numbers and icons, white card backgrounds, monospace code blocks in dark charcoal
Text (verbatim): "1" "2" "3" "4" as large bold step number labels; "Hermes" and "GLMCodingPlan" as section header labels
Constraints: step numbers 1 2 3 4 must be visually dominant; each step panel must be clearly separated; all text elements must be legible at A4 print size; arrows or connectors between steps to show flow
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, gradients, decorative flourishes, clipart-style icons, watermarks, blurry text
